_comment: Rename data/profile.example/ → data/profile/ and this file is ready to edit.
_instructions: Add projects NOT on GitHub, or projects you want to describe manually.
Fields: name, description, tech_stack, domains, highlights, github_url (null if no link), period.

name: Example Project Without GitHub
description: A brief description of what this project does and the problem it solves.

highlights.text: Built a REST API handling 10k+ daily requests
Reduced processing time by 40% via caching layer
Deployed on AWS EC2 with auto-scaling

name: Example Project With Manual Description
description: Even if a project IS on GitHub, add it here to control CV bullet points exactly.

highlights.text: RAG pipeline over 50k+ documents with sub-200ms retrieval
Achieved 92% answer accuracy on internal benchmark
